sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for node in nodes:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue square id={node['id']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Check border
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"Top row: {ascii_lines[0].count('B')} B's, {ascii_lines[0].count('W')} W's")
print(f"Bottom row: {ascii_lines[63].count('B')} B's, {ascii_lines[63].count('W')} W's")

# Check initial blue square positions from history
if len(history) > 0:
    init_seg = history[0].frame.segmentation
    for node in init_seg['nodes']:
        if node['color'] == 'S':
            b = node['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"Initial blue square id={node['id']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
